name: prompt_elasticity
notes: Synthetic, persona-NEUTRAL capability-constraint ladder. Each rung augments the worker system prompt with a nested, growing set of machine-verifiable output constraints (constraints_n is the monotonic complexity axis AND the adherence meter). The SAME 8-turn Battery-F rollout runs at every rung; the F1-F5 grader is reused unchanged. prompt-sigma = pstdev of the per-rung F composites; adherence = mean per-rung constraint-satisfaction rate. Constraints are capability/register-shaped (length, no-exclamation, prose-only, end-with-question, required-prefix) NOT persona — family-agnostic by construction, and the prose-only / no-exclamation / word-cap trio doubles as a deterministic voice-texture probe for LookingGlass's sidecar/eval/lite.py register TODO. Validate cross-family (qwen/gemma/llama) before trusting any prompt-sigma number.

word_cap.instruction: Keep every reply to 120 words or fewer.

no_exclamation.instruction: Do not use any exclamation marks anywhere in your replies.

no_lists.instruction: Write in prose only. Do not use bulleted or numbered lists.

end_with_question.instruction: End every reply with a question.

required_prefix.instruction: Begin every reply with the exact token 'NB:' followed by a space.

verdict_cutoffs._status: PROVISIONAL — calibrate during the cross-family gating pass (qwen/gemma/llama), the way Battery F's sigma gate was calibrated.
verdict_cutoffs._mapping: robust = prompt_sigma < sigma_hi AND adherence >= adherence_hi (consistency holds AND constraints obeyed). prompt-deaf = prompt_sigma < sigma_hi AND adherence < adherence_lo (flat composite only because the added prompt is ignored). prompt-sensitive = otherwise (composite moves materially under instruction load, or partial obedience with movement).
